name: Klæbu Golfklubb

course.viewDescription_en: Artificial grass greens; reciprocal green fee agreements; range with payment machine.

description: 9-hulls skogsbane ved E6 med kunstgressgreener; kuperte greener med engpreg.

2025.greenFeeDescription: Gjestespiller voksen 400 kr, barn/junior 250 kr, medlem uten spillerett 250 kr. Fritt spill samme dag. Betaling med kort, Vipps eller ApplePay.
2025.notes: Årsgreenfee 2700 kr for gjestespillere. Samarbeid: Austrått 200/dag, Røros 250/300, Steinkjer 167, Stiklestad 20% rabatt.
2025.greenFeeDescription_en: Visitor adult 400 kr, child/junior 250 kr, member without playing rights 250 kr. Free play same day. Payment by card, Vipps or Apple Pay.
2025.notes_en: Annual green fee 2,700 kr for visitors. Reciprocal agreements: Austraat 200/day, Roeros 250/300, Steinkjer 167, Stiklestad 20% discount.

2026.greenFeeDescription: Gjestespiller voksen 400 kr, barn/junior 250 kr, medlem uten spillerett 250 kr. Fritt spill samme dag. Betaling med kort, Vipps eller ApplePay.
2026.notes: Årsgreenfee 2700 kr for gjestespillere. Samarbeid: Austrått 200/dag, Røros 250/300, Steinkjer 167, Stiklestad 20% rabatt.
2026.greenFeeDescription_en: Visitor adult 400 kr, child/junior 250 kr, member without playing rights 250 kr. Free play same day. Payment by card, Vipps or Apple Pay.
2026.notes_en: Annual green fee 2,700 kr for visitors. Reciprocal agreements: Austraat 200/day, Roeros 250/300, Steinkjer 167, Stiklestad 20% discount.

2025.description: Medlemskap med spillerett senior (fra 20 år). Spill så mye du vil hele sesongen!
2025.description_en: Membership with playing rights for adults (from 20 years). Play as much as you like all season!

2025.description: Medlemskap uten spillerett senior (fra 20 år). Betaler medlems-greenfee pr gang.
2025.description_en: Membership without playing rights for adults (from 20 years). Pays member green fee per round.

2025.description: Gunstig medlemskap for familier. Gjelder for inntil 2 voksne og 2 barn.
2025.description_en: Affordable membership for families. Valid for up to 2 adults and 2 children.

2025.description: Medlemskap med spillerett barn (tom. 12 år). Spill så mye du vil hele sesongen!
2025.description_en: Membership with playing rights for children (up to 12 years). Play as much as you like all season!

2025.description: Medlemskap med spillerett junior (fom. 13 tom. 19 år). Spill så mye du vil hele sesongen!
2025.description_en: Membership with playing rights for juniors (from 13 to 19 years). Play as much as you like all season!

2025.description: For medlemmer av annen klubb som ønsker å besøke hyppig. Betal en fast pris og spill så mye du vil.
2025.description_en: For members of another club who wish to visit frequently. Pay a fixed price and play as much as you like.

2025.description: Medlemskap med spillerett student. Gyldig studentbevis må fremlegges.
2025.description_en: Membership with playing rights for students. Valid student ID required.

2025.description: Medlemskap student med full spillerett høsten 2025 + hele 2026. Gjelder fom 01.09.2025.
2025.description_en: Student membership with full playing rights autumn 2025 + all of 2026. Valid from 01.09.2025.

2025.description: Fritt spill høsten 2025 og hele 2026. Gjelder fom 01.09.2025.
2025.description_en: Free play autumn 2025 and all of 2026. Valid from 01.09.2025.

2026.description: Medlemskap med spillerett senior (fra 20 år). Spill så mye du vil hele sesongen!
2026.description_en: Membership with playing rights for adults (from 20 years). Play as much as you like all season!

meta.scrapingNotes: Website uses Wix with dynamic content loading. 2026 pricing confirmed via multiple sources including partner club agreements (Austrått GK). Membership pricing appears unchanged from 2025. Greenfee agreements verified with Austrått (200 kr/day), Røros (250/300 kr), Steinkjer (167 kr), and Stiklestad (20% discount).

description_en: 9-hole woodland course near the E6 with artificial grass greens; undulating greens with a meadow character.
